overall.description: A first-person walk through a narrow industrial alleyway at night in a video game environment (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera moves through a concrete corridor with overhead pipes and wall-mounted lights, creating a moody, dystopian atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial back alley with overhead piping

events.description: passing under the large red overhead pipe structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the narrow concrete alley toward the red overhead pipe

entered.detail: tall concrete walls with metal chain-link fencing on top
large red industrial pipe spanning overhead with text visible on its surface
warm yellow wall-mounted lights illuminating the path
white spray-painted graffiti tags on the concrete walls

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking down a narrow industrial alley at night. Tall concrete walls with chain-link fencing rise on both sides, illuminated by warm wall-mounted lights. The camera approaches a large red overhead pipe structure spanning the alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial alley beyond the overhead pipe

agents.ego_description: continuing down the alley past the overhead pipe toward the distant end

entered.detail: distant structure marking the end of the alley visible in the fog

segments.scene_description: Having passed under the red pipe, the camera continues walking down the dirt alley. The walls remain consistent with chain-link fencing visible at the top, and the path stretches toward a distant point where the alley appears to end or turn.

scene_state.functional_zone: side wall path with security door

events.description: turning right to walk along the right-hand wall

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking along the right wall of the alley, passing a metal door

entered.detail: metal security door with graffiti above it set into the concrete wall
metal catwalk structure visible above the left wall

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right and proceeds along the right wall, revealing a metal security door with graffiti tags. The red overhead pipe becomes visible again ahead as the camera moves parallel to the wall, with an overhead catwalk structure now visible in the distance.

events.description: turning back to face down the alley toward the red pipe

agents.ego_description: walking back toward the red overhead pipe from the opposite direction

segments.scene_description: Turning back to face the length of the alley, the camera walks toward the red overhead pipe now visible ahead. The metal door and catwalk are left behind as the camera returns to the central alley path, approaching the pipe structure.

events.description: passing under the red overhead pipe structure again
turning right at the end of the alley

agents.ego_description: passing under the pipe, continuing to the end, and turning right to walk along the wall

entered.detail: green and white graffiti tags on the lower right wall

segments.scene_description: The camera passes under the red pipe once more and continues to the end of the alley, where it turns right. A metal door with green graffiti tags becomes visible on the right wall as the camera moves along the side path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a narrow industrial alleyway that shifts from a linear path into a detailed exploration of its concrete boundaries. It begins by moving down a corridor of tall concrete walls and chain-link fencing, passing beneath a prominent red overhead pipe illuminated by warm wall-mounted lights. As the camera continues along the dirt path, it veers right to reveal a graffiti-covered metal security door and a distant overhead catwalk before turning back to retrace its steps toward the central alley. The scene then shifts as the camera passes under the red pipe once more, proceeding to the very end of the corridor. Finally, the movement turns right one last time, gliding along the side path to reveal another metal door marked with green graffiti.
